comments.comment_text: Figure resolution is too low for print. Please provide at 300 dpi minimum.
comments.summary_ko: 그림 해상도 부족. 최소 300 dpi 필요.
comments.response_text: Replaced with 300 dpi version in Rev 02.

comments.comment_text: The velocity model used for lines L0050-L0080 appears incorrect. Water velocity should be 1500 m/s, not 1480 m/s as stated.
comments.summary_ko: L0050-L0080 라인 속도 모델 오류. 수중 음속 1480 → 1500 m/s 수정 필요.
comments.response_text: Velocity model corrected and data reprocessed for lines L0050-L0080. Updated in Rev 02.

comments.comment_text: Table caption is missing the survey line numbers. Please add line range.
comments.summary_ko: 표 캡션에 조사 라인 번호 누락. 라인 범위 추가 필요.
comments.response_text: Caption updated with line range L0001-L0120.

comments.comment_text: The coordinate system reference should be WGS84 UTM Zone 52N, not Zone 51N.
comments.summary_ko: 좌표계 오류: UTM Zone 51N → Zone 52N 수정 필요.
comments.response_text: Coordinate system corrected throughout the document. All coordinates re-projected to UTM Zone 52N.

comments.comment_text: Please use 'seabed' consistently throughout (not 'sea bed' or 'sea-bed').
comments.summary_ko: 'seabed' 용어 통일 필요 (sea bed, sea-bed 혼용).

comments.comment_text: The sentence 'Data was processed using the latest software' is unclear. Please specify the software name and version.
comments.summary_ko: '최신 소프트웨어' 표현 불명확. 소프트웨어명 및 버전 명시 필요.
comments.response_text: Updated to 'Data was processed using CARIS HIPS & SIPS v12.0'.

comments.comment_text: Table of Contents page numbers do not match actual content pages.
comments.summary_ko: 목차 페이지 번호와 실제 내용 페이지 불일치.
comments.response_text: TOC regenerated with correct page numbers.

comments.comment_text: When will the Rev02 be submitted?
comments.response_text: Rev02 is planned for submission by end of October 2025.
comments.exclude_reason: Logistics/timeline question, not a document comment

comments.comment_text: Figure 2.1 shows the wrong survey area boundary. The northern limit should extend to 35.5N.
comments.summary_ko: 그림 2.1 조사 영역 경계 오류. 북쪽 한계 35.5N까지 확장 필요.
comments.response_text: Figure regenerated with correct survey boundary extending to 35.5N.
